page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8ine.4xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with an Intel Xeon Sapphire Rapids processor running at a base clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The instance is configured with 16 dedicated physical cores and 16 vCPUs, meaning there is no hyperthreading enabled, which ensures dedicated execution resources for compute-bound workloads.

The instance is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage, requiring external block storage volumes for persistent data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline network bandwidth of 23 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers between instances and external services. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are bundled with this server.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated core allocation and 1:2 CPU-to-memory ratio make this instance highly optimized for compute-heavy workloads where resource contention must be avoided. The absence of bundled local storage and GPUs reduces overhead costs for deployments that rely on network-attached storage and CPU-only processing. This hardware profile is suited for workloads such as batch processing, high-performance web serving, distributed analytics, and compute-intensive application servers.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8ine.4xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 16 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon Sapphire Rapids x86_64 processor running at 2.7 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, it provides dedicated CPU resources without hyperthreading. The instance is equipped with 32.0 GB of RAM, yielding a 2.0 GB per core ratio, and features a baseline network bandwidth of 23 Gbps. It contains no local storage or GPUs, making it a streamlined option for compute-bound tasks. This hardware profile is suited for batch processing, web serving, and distributed compute workloads requiring consistent CPU performance.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8ine.4xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 16 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 32 GB RAM, and 23 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for high-performance CPU workloads.
